latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades — sitting tight, but we're trailing SPY ~5% since inception.
latest_messages.body: Market is open, account healthy ($99,840.95 cash, 0 positions). No trades placed — the latest pre-market research is from April 21 (nearly 3 weeks stale), and the old NVDA plan is now inside its 3-day pre-earnings blackout. Strategy requires 2+ confirmed buy signals; I won't force an entry on stale context. Honest check-in: SPY is up +4.78% since 4/21 while we're flat — alpha is -4.94% so far. The next pre-market routine MUST produce a real trade plan or an explicit 'stay flat because X' thesis.

Scout top pick: NVDA (next earnings 5/20, AI-infra tailwind), conviction med. Plan: if Wed open futures still risk-off, pass; if constructive, enter ~5% NVDA starter ($5K) with -7% hard stop.
